Amazon is an Amazon-exclusive bundle of クリニカ Kid's グレープ (purple packaging) ×4 + Y-字フロス. Rakuten shows a blue-packaged クリニカ Kid's single tube (ソーダ flavor), sold as 5-pack. Beyond the count difference, the flavors/variants differ: grape (Amazon) vs soda (Rakuten).

Amazon is POPOTAN 優 — a general-use adult/teen 360-degree toothbrush with a spiral handle, no safety plate. Rakuten is POPOTAN ベビープラス — an infant-specific 360-degree toothbrush (乳児〜3歳頃) with a safety plate attachment. These are clearly different products within the POPOTAN line targeting completely different age groups with different designs.

Both are Lion こどもハブラシ 6-12才 Dragon Ball brushes. The Rakuten title says 'ドラゴンボール改' but the product image clearly shows Dragon Ball Super (blue-haired Goku/Vegeta) identical to the Amazon listing — same brand, line, age range, and product. Quantity differs (10本 vs 20個セット of the same unit).

Both are Ebisu Detective Conan toothbrushes but different age/size variants: Amazon is 3-6才, Rakuten is 2-6才. The Amazon image label shows '3-6才' and the Rakuten image shows '2～6才' — these are distinct SKUs for different developmental stages.

Amazon is the Pigeon 乳歯ブラシ レッスン段階3 full toothbrush set (2 brushes + safety plate, 12か月+). The Rakuten listing's description explicitly states it is the safety plate accessory only ('安全プレートのみの商品でブラシは付属しません') — a completely different product type (accessory vs toothbrush set).

Both are Skater TB5SE 8-pack 3-5才 toothbrushes with the same specs, but Amazon features Pokemon 2025 characters and Rakuten features I'm Doraemon characters. Despite sharing model number TB5SE, these are different licensed-character SKUs sold as distinct products.

Both are Ebisu 0.5-2才 toothbrushes with identical specs (幅広×薄型ヘッド, やわらかめ, Japan-made). The only difference is the character design (Tomica vs Hello Kitty) — a cosmetic/design variant, not a product identity mismatch. Quantity differs (5個セット vs 1本).

Both are KISS YOU ionic replacement brush heads (2本), but the Amazon item is the adult 極細レギュラー line while the Rakuten item is the こども用 children's line. The images confirm this: Amazon packaging is labeled 極細毛レギュラー (adult); Rakuten packaging clearly says こども用. These are different product lines with incompatible replacement heads targeting different users.

Same brand Skater, same model TB5ST, same age range 3–5才, same softness やわらかめ. Amazon sells 3本 (Pokémon design); Rakuten sells 6本 (2×3本, パンどろぼう design). Character artwork is cosmetic and model number is identical. Count differs (3 vs 6 brushes) so qtyDiffers=true, but the underlying unit is the same product.

Both are Ebisu antibacterial toothbrush caps (3個入), but Amazon image shows standard-size caps (labeled 大人用 / general use, EBiSU travel line) while Rakuten image and title explicitly state 幅広ヘッド用 (wide-head). Standard caps and wide-head caps are physically different and not interchangeable, making these distinct product variants.

Both are Pigeon 乳歯ブラシ レッスン段階2 (9か月~). Both images show the same orange/yellow stage-2 brush with safety plate. Amazon is a single unit; Rakuten is a 5-pack (1本入×5個セット). Underlying product is identical; only count differs.

Amazon lists Pigeon 乳歯ブラシ レッスン段階1 (complete brush with safety plate, 4–5か月~). Rakuten's description explicitly states 'ブラシは付属していません' — it is selling only the replacement safety plate accessory, not the brush. These are fundamentally different products (brush vs plate-only accessory), confirmed by the Rakuten description.

Both are Pigeon 歯みがきナップ 42包 but the Amazon listing is the unflavored/plain (blue box) variant while the Rakuten listing is the strawberry flavor (ほんのりいちご味, pink box). The images clearly show two different flavor variants of the same line.

Amazon is a SODATECO (Sunstar) conventional angled-head toothbrush for 6-12yr. Rakuten is a U-shaped mouthpiece-style (U型歯ブラシ) toothbrush from a different brand entirely. Completely different brush type and brand.

Amazon shows the adult Ebisu PROGRIP type-I (clear geometric transparent handle, colored bristle tips, 3-pack). Rakuten shows the children's Ebisu LET'S PROGRIP B-3640M (patterned colored handles, slim tapered head for 10+, 18-pack). These are distinct sub-lines within the Ebisu Pro Grip family with different head geometry and target users.

Amazon shows a standard adult-style Ebisu PROGRIP (white handle, pink bristles, no child branding). Rakuten shows the children's Ebisu LET'S PROGRIP B-3640M (patterned handles, slim tapered head, for children 10+, 7-pack). Different sub-lines with different head design and target users.

Both are Johnson's Baby すやすやタイムローション 300mL in the same purple bottle. The Amazon listing has a promotional celebrity-endorsement label attached to the bottle top, but the underlying product is identical — same brand, same product name, same size, same formula.

Amazon shows 'filbaby REPAIR' (リペア) sub-line — a distinct barrier-repair formulation with 'REPAIR' clearly printed on the bottle and box. Rakuten shows the standard 'filbaby' (no REPAIR), same 380g size but a different product line with different formulation and branding. These are not the same SKU.

Both are Johnson's Baby lightly scented (微香性) lotion 500ml. Amazon shows the newer 'ミルクローション' name with 新処方 packaging (pink bottle), while Rakuten shows the older 'ベビーローション 微香性' label — same product line, same scent variant, same size. Packaging/formula name refresh does not change product identity.

Both are Pigeon 薬用ローション ももの葉 (same brand and line) but the Amazon image shows 600ml (キューブパック大容量) and the Rakuten image clearly shows 200ml box carton. These are different size SKUs, not a multi-pack of the same unit.

Amazon is a 2-pack of identical Pigeon Baby Cream 50g tubes. Rakuten title lists a bundle of two different products: 'ピジョン ベビークリーム 50g' + 'ピジョン ベビークリアオイル 80ml' — an entirely different item (clear oil) is paired with the cream. The bundle contents differ fundamentally.

Both are Johnson's Baby unscented (無香料) lotion 500ml. Amazon shows the newer 'ミルクローション 無香料' 新処方 packaging (white/blue bottle), Rakuten shows the older 'ベビーローション 無香料' design — same product identity, same scent (none), same brand and size. Packaging generation difference only.

Same product: WAKODO ミルふわ 高保水ベビークリーム 70g. Amazon is a 2-pack pouch format; Rakuten is a single tube. Underlying unit is identical — same brand, product line, size, and formulation confirmed in both images and descriptions.
Same product: Pigeon ベビーミルクローション うるおいプラス キューブパック 600g. Both images show the identical yellow pump bottle (Shea butter / うるおいプラス variant), same branding, same size. Titles are consistent.

Same product: ユタカメイク #3000シルバーシート 4.5×5.4m. Amazon image shows original labeled packaging; Rakuten image shows the folded sheet itself. Both titles and Rakuten description confirm identical specs (same brand, grade #3000, silver, 4.5×5.4m dimensions).

Same product: メンソレータム サンプレイ ベビーミルク 30g SPF34 PA+++. Amazon is a single unit; Rakuten is a 120-unit case lot. Both images show the same SUNPLAY Baby Milk SPF34 PA+++ product — packaging design/era differs slightly but brand, line, SPF, and PA rating are identical.

PA rating mismatch: Amazon image clearly shows SPF29 PA+++ (3 pluses); Rakuten image clearly shows SPF29 PA++ (2 pluses). The Rakuten description also states PA++. These are different UV protection grades of the アトピタ 保湿UVクリーム, not the same product.

Both images show the identical Organic Madonna Aroma Guard Mist (same green bottle, 98% organic, same branding). Amazon title says 80ml while Rakuten covers both 35ml and 80ml sizes — same product identity, only the specific size unit may differ between listings.
Amazon image clearly shows Atopita 保湿UVクリーム50 with SPF50/PA++++, while Rakuten image clearly shows SPF29/PA++. These are different SPF formulations — a real identity mismatch.

Amazon listing is the 'Magic Hour' limited-edition fragrance variant (pink/holographic packaging, labeled 'Fragrance Limited Edition') while Rakuten is the standard Biore UV Aqua Rich Aqua Protect Mist (standard blue packaging). Different fragrance variant.

Amazon image shows Skin Aqua Tone Up UV Essence in Blue (はかなげブルー, suppresses redness), while Rakuten image clearly shows the Lavender variant (ラベンダー, brightens sallow skin). These are distinct color/tone-up SKUs with different cosmetic effects, not a minor design difference.

Amazon is a bundle of the regular bottle + refill bottle together (セット売り: 60ml + つけかえ用60ml), while Rakuten is the refill-only (つけかえ用) product. Different bundle contents — one includes the base unit, the other is refill-only.

Both are LecBe baby wipes 80枚×3個, but Amazon is the '水99% あかちゃんのおしりふき' (弱酸性, fully additive-free) while Rakuten is the '水99.9% ふんわりおしりふき' with added W保湿成分 (コラーゲン + モモ葉エキス). Different product lines: the Rakuten formulation adds moisturising ingredients explicitly absent from the Amazon version. Images confirm distinct packaging designs and branding variants.

Both are the ZOOBLY brand grey high-low chair with identical dimensions (W64×D70×H87cm high / W47×D37×H58cm low), 5kg, PP/PU materials, dual-level tray, and castor wheels. Images show the same physical chair from the same multi-angle composite shots. Amazon title says '一台二役' while Rakuten says '一台5役' (adding rocking mode), but the product is the same; Amazon listing simply underspecified the features.

Amazon shows the ZOOBLY multi-mode high-low chair with castors and an oval padded backrest (same unit as 9638). The Rakuten image shows a structurally different 2WAY folding high chair with fixed legs (no castors), a patterned geometric cushion seat, and a different tray design — a clearly different product from a different brand.

Amazon (FLYKING/MADIHU) is a newborn-oriented 4-in-1 bouncer/rocker/stroller with a canopy and toy arch, designed for infants from newborn stage in a reclined position. The Rakuten item is a conventional upright high-low dining chair (ハイチェア/ローチェア) with a food tray, suited for weaning-age children who can sit upright. These are fundamentally different product types despite both being called 'baby chairs'.

Amazon shows the same high-low chair design (W64×D70×H87cm, oval backrest, dual-level tray, casters, 5-point belt) in a beige/cream colorway. Rakuten (8Loop) shows the same chair design in yellow. The structure, tray layout, caster arrangement, and backrest shape are identical — only the color and brand label differ, which does not change product identity.

Amazon (enne. brand) shows a compact pink 5-way hi/lo chair with no wheels, folding X-frame legs, and a small footprint. Rakuten shows a completely different chair: large beige/grey unit with 4 swivel castors, rocking/reclining function (ゆりかご式), wide seat, and a totally different structural design. Different brand, different form factor.

Despite identical titles, the images show distinct products. Amazon shows a beige hi-lo chair with a round oval egg-shaped seat back and 4 swivel castors. Rakuten shows a chair with a scalloped/shell-shaped seat back, different proportions, and a different structural design. These are different generic chair models.

Amazon shows an outdoor portable camping-style baby chair with a canopy, fabric seat on an aluminium X-frame — a standalone floor chair for outdoor use. Rakuten shows a table-clamp hook-on booster seat (テーブルチェア) that attaches to the dining table edge. Completely different product types.

Amazon (beehive brand, green) shows a hi-lo chair with a round egg-shaped seat, white frame, under-seat storage shelf, and dual front/back footrest design. Rakuten shows a different chair with a different seat silhouette, different leg structure, storage bag underneath, and no brand match. Visually distinct products.

Both images show the same compact low-chair design: rounded plastic seat shell, grey metal legs, distinctive side wheel/dial decoration, and tray attachment. Amazon shows yellow, Rakuten shows yellow and orange variants — color difference only. Titles are identical. Same product.

Amazon shows an 'enne.' branded solid blue plastic 5-way high/low chair with a specific fold-flat design and 5-point harness. Rakuten shows a completely different chair from a different brand: white/cream metal frame, colorful patterned upholstery, castors/wheels, 6-height steps, and a 2-layer tray. Different brand and entirely different product design.

Amazon is specifically Pigeon ベビー全身泡ソープ ベビーフラワーの香り (flower scent) 800ml refill. The Rakuten listing is a 4-pack (800ml×4) and its image shows all three scent variants (無香料, 蜂蜜の香り, ベビーフラワーの香り) in the listing photo, indicating a mixed-scent bundle rather than the single flower-scent item. Scent and bundle contents differ.

Amazon is Pigeon ベビー石けん (classic bar soap, 植物性, red-box packaging) 90g 2-pack. Rakuten is Pigeon ベビーソープ 90g (newer formulation in modern white 'Baby Soap' box, 無香料, 合成界面活性剤-free). These are distinct product lines with different branding, formulas, and packaging despite both being Pigeon bar soaps.

Amazon is Pigeon ベビー全身泡ソープ しっとり (moisturizing, orange packaging) 800ml refill. Rakuten is Pigeon ベビー全身泡ソープ 無香料 (fragrance-free, blue packaging) 800ml refill in a 3-pack. The images confirm different product variants (しっとり vs 無香料).
Both are アトピタ 保湿全身泡ソープ 350ml, but Amazon image shows a refill soft pouch (詰替え用) while Rakuten image shows a pump dispenser bottle. These are different product types/forms of the same product line.

Both are arau.baby 泡全身ソープ 詰替 400ml, but Amazon is the standard 'すべすべ' (normal skin) variant (pink packaging) while Rakuten is the 'しっとり' (moisturizing) variant (orange packaging). The Rakuten title explicitly says 'しっとり' and the images confirm different sub-line formulations targeting different skin types.

Both are Pigeon ベビー全身泡ソープ 詰替 400ml, but Amazon is 無香料 (unscented, blue packaging) while Rakuten is 'ベビーフラワー' scent (pink packaging, product code 570446). The Rakuten title explicitly names the scent variant and the packaging color confirms the difference.

Amazon is キューピー ベビー全身泡ソープ しっとり詰替用 350ml (a full-body soap refill pouch by COW brand), while Rakuten is キューピー ベビーシャンプー 泡タイプ ポンプ付 350ml (a hair shampoo with pump bottle). Different product type: full-body soap refill vs hair-only shampoo pump bottle.

Both are Johnson's ベビー全身シャンプー 泡タイプ 詰替 350ml, but Amazon is the standard yellow-packaged formula ('specially for newborn') while Rakuten is the 'すやすやタイム' bedtime/relaxing aroma line (purple packaging). The images clearly show two distinct product lines with different scents.

Amazon is a 3-pack of pax baby 全身シャンプー refill pouches 300ml (詰替用), while Rakuten is a single pax baby 全身シャンプー pump bottle 300ml (泡タイプ ポンプ). Same brand/line but different product types: refill pouches vs standalone pump bottle. Qty also differs (3 vs 1).

The tube dimensions differ critically: Amazon lists inner diameter 7mm / outer 10mm; Rakuten (DearJapan brand) lists inner diameter 4mm / outer 7mm. These are incompatible replacement parts with different bore sizes, making them different products. Additionally, the Rakuten image shows a fuller bundle (tube + collection pot + suction unit) while the Amazon listing is a single tube only.

Amazon listing is a replacement parts set (nozzle + tube + storage case) for the MamaCute aspirator. The Rakuten listing is the complete MamaCute 鼻水吸引器 main unit (full green device shown in box). One is a spare parts accessory, the other is the full aspirator device — a clear TYPE mismatch.

Amazon shows a white gun-style infrared thermometer with a green LCD and multiple buttons (standard forehead-gun form factor). Rakuten shows a compact black cylindrical/pocket-sized touch thermometer with a single button — a completely different form factor, design, and likely different brand. These are distinct product types, not the same item.

Both are no-brand/OEM freestanding plastic baby circle/playard with a door, 260cm width, cream/off-white color, self-standing design. The Rakuten image shows the same product with a pink door accent; both listings describe identical dimensions and features. Minor cosmetic color difference on the door panel does not change product identity.

Both are the 日本育児 おくだけとおせんぼ Lサイズ モロッカンベージュ baby gate (140~180cm width, 6–24 months). The Rakuten image clearly shows the Nihon Ikuji brand logo and matching L-size dimensions. Titles are effectively identical. Same brand, same product line, same size, same color.

Both are retractable mesh roll gates but the Amazon listing is a single 140cm-max unit (高86cm) while the Rakuten listing covers up to 180cm (140/180cm dual-size). Different maximum width capacity makes these distinct size variants, not the same product.

Both are BabyDan Multidan gates but Amazon is the black metal version (62.5–106.8cm) while Rakuten is the wood (ブナ材) version (60.5–102cm). Images confirm metal bars vs wooden bars — different material/type variants with different width ranges. Not the same product identity.

Both are generic baby gate screw-rod adapter bolt sets (4-pack, M10 threaded rods with plastic caps). No brand on either listing. The knob cap shape differs slightly (flat vs ridged) between images but both are the same functional generic accessory type in identical quantity. Insufficient brand or spec difference to confirm removal.

Amazon listing is branded 'GU MODE' (幅260cm, gray/beige foldable panel fence). Rakuten listing has no identifiable brand and the product image shows a different self-standing baby circle design. Different brands/manufacturers on what appear to be generically similar but distinct products.

Amazon is an アイリスプラザ (Iris Plaza) branded steel gate extension panel in mocha brown metal bar style. Rakuten is a different/generic brand extension panel in white/ivory. Different brands and different colors confirmed by images — not the same product.

Both listings are roll-up mesh safety gates, 110cm wide x 78cm tall, same type and construction. Amazon lists the Yizibuur brand but the Rakuten image shows the same product installed and confirms identical specs (110*78cm). Visual design and specs match.

Both are 4-piece round wall-saver pad sets but they are visually distinct products. The Amazon unit has a flat top with concentric-ring silicone base; the Rakuten unit has a scalloped/bumpy top with a sunburst-petal silicone base. Different mold/design from different manufacturers, not the same SKU.

Both are freestanding white wood-slatted baby gate/fences with a door panel, expandable up to 273–551cm. Both images show the identical product configured in various layouts. Same type, size range, and design.

Both are roll-up mesh safety gates, height 86cm. Amazon specifies the 150cm width variant; Rakuten covers 150/180/300cm options but the 150cm variant overlaps. Same product type, same height, same mesh roll construction. The broader Rakuten listing includes the exact same 150cm unit.

Both are the Puhang brand metal bar pet gate with the same visual design and glove accessory. However, the Amazon listing is the 69–75cm width variant while the Rakuten listing is the 83–89cm width variant. Different size SKUs of the same product line.

Amazon image shows a large structural Y-shaped mounting bracket with two curved arms (for securing a gate to a wall/staircase). Rakuten image shows small Y字型トップボルト — compact bolt accessories that screw into the top of a pressure-mount gate. These are fundamentally different components: a bracket vs. a bolt accessory.

Both listings are a 20cm steel baby gate extension panel (スチールゲート専用拡張パネル 20cm). Amazon lists ミルキーホワイト; Rakuten shows multiple color options including white. Same product type, same width, same compatible gate system.

Amazon title explicitly states 幅260cm for this listing. Rakuten advertises maximum 650cm expandable (with 360cm also listed in title). These are different size configurations of what appears to be a similar generic panel fence product — the width range/panel count differs materially enough that a shopper would not consider them the same item.

Both are retractable roll-up mesh baby/pet gates with maximum 140cm width. Amazon image shows grey mesh roll gate; Rakuten image shows a white/grey roll gate with the same mechanism and same 140cm max width. Same product type, same key specification.

Amazon image shows a compact plastic baby circle branded CHILDHOOD (visible embossed text on door panel), sized 150×180cm. Rakuten image shows a generic no-brand キッズパーテーション expandable up to 650cm — a different size class and unbranded. Different brand/source product.
